agentRecommendation.reasoning: CC0 licence — the cleanest possible. Zero legal risk, no attribution required, no SA contamination. Peninsula-verifiable morning coastal scene at Sorrento. 2796px clears 2400px hero minimum. Taken August 2021 (Australian winter — ideal off-season alignment). This is the single lowest-risk image in the entire Tier A pipeline.

rejected.note: Sorrento Back Beach at 5637px is higher-res but CC-BY-SA. Reserve for explore-sorrento-back-beach-01 in Week 3 if SA policy resolves.
